nasb.text: God is not a man, that He should lie, Nor a son of man, that He should repent; Has He said, and will He not do it? Or has He spoken, and will He not make it good?

esv.text: God is not man, that he should lie, or a son of man, that he should change his mind. Has he said, and will he not do it? Or has he spoken, and will he not fulfill it?

cnv.text: 神不是人，必不致說謊， 也不是人子，必不致後悔。 他說話，怎能不作？ 他發言，怎能不作成？

ccb.text: 上帝并非世人，祂不撒谎； 上帝不是凡人，祂不反悔。 祂言出必行，信守承诺。
